emails.subject: vacation time
emails.body: Joanne: I'm having trouble checking on this. Can you tell me how much vacation time I have used in 2001? Thanks. Sara Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: vacation time
emails.body: RE: vacation time Per John Blaylock in HR, you have 48.50 hours left (you had 160 including 40 carryover- and used all but the 48.5) To: Rozycki, Joanne

emails.subject: RE: vacation time
emails.body: Thanks. Is the 48.5 hours remaining on Sept. 30? Also, I need a file for: "Yen CLN Merrill Lynch" To: Shackleton, Sara
